question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/Downloader.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: downloadAndParseSigFiles()] Can an unprivileged external user, by causing the streamFileProvider.list() to return an infinite or very large stream of filenames, exhaust the memory of the mirror node process via the TreeMultimap growing unboundedly, causing an OutOfMemoryError that crashes the downloader and prevents all transaction gossip?
